title: Fix develop CI failures in FeedbackEvaluation and LangGraphScore tests

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: CI run 24379873795 failing in Python Tests (3.11/3.12): 10 failures in FeedbackEvaluation (AttributeError: metrics_tasks missing in Evaluation.run finally cleanup path) and 2 failures in LangGraphScore_test patch target (module no longer exports calculate_cost). Implementing fix now.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Fixed and pushed commit 062ddefc5 on develop. Root causes from failed run 24379873795: FeedbackEvaluation path regressed (missing feedback-specific run path; cleanup assumed metrics_tasks) and LangGraph cost tests patched removed symbol calculate_cost. Validation: local poetry pytest target files pass, local invoke ci pass, dashboard npm ci --include=optional pass. GitHub CI/CD Pipeline run 24380591229 is green: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/actions/runs/24380591229
